name: Giant Oatmeal Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups QUAKER Oats (quick or old-fashioned, uncooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease two large cookie sheets lightly with butter.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the brown sugar and margarine until fluffy.
4. Add eggs and vanilla; blend well.
5. Stir in the flour mixture (baking soda and salt) and oats until combined.
6. Fold in chocolate pieces and chopped nuts.
7. Divide the dough into two equal parts.
8. Press each half onto a cookie sheet to form circles about 3/4 inch thick.
9. Bake for 17-20 minutes, or until lightly browned.
10. Let cool on the sheets for 5 minutes before transferring to wire racks.
11. Allow cookies to cool completely before cutting into wedges.
Makes 2 giant cookies.
Variation: For a larger batch, drop dough by rounded tablespoonfuls onto ungreased cookie sheets and bake for 10-12 minutes. This yields about 3 dozen cookies.
